candidate_definitions.text: A project page template for academic papers. Demo at https://eliahuhorwitz.github.io/Academic-project-page-template/

> **Update (September 2025)**: This template has been modernized with better design, SEO, and mobile support. For the original version, see the [original-version branch](https://github.com/eliahuhorwitz/Academic-project-page-template/tree/original-version).

candidate_glosses.text: > **Update (September 2025)**: This template has been modernized with better design, SEO, and mobile support. For the original version, see the [original-version branch](https://github.com/eliahuhorwitz/Academic-project-page-template/tree/original-version).
